name.value: ELZ - Serving XIS - Scenario 4 ZonderBA - Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_Weele - target CheckContent - JSON Format

description.value: Scenario 4 - Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_Weele
OAuth Token for patient 'patient-XXX-Weele'
Resource.id for Patient 1
Resource.id for PractitionerRole 1

name.value: Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_Weele

description.value: Serve Consent resources of patient XXX_Weele
Test server to serve Consent resource.
Confirm that the operation was successful
Confirm that all Coding elements contain both a .system and a .code.
Confirm that the OID of the zib valueset is not used for the system of a coding element.

Confirm that all CodeableConcept elements contain either a coding.display or a text value if no Coding exists or has an extension (e.g. a nullFlavor or data-absent-reason extension). For more information see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3Use_of_coded_concepts.
Confirm that all References have a display value, see https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/FHIR:V1.0_FHIR_IG_STU3#Use_of_the_reference_datatype.

Confirm that all Identifiers have both a .system and a .value. In rare cases where a general category of identifiers can be used, .type can replace .system. Edge cases for both .system and .type to be unknown are not applicable to Nictiz. For more information, see https://www.hl7.org/fhir/stu3/datatypes.html#Identifier.

name.value: Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_Weele - Check Patient

description.value: Check if the previous operation results in a FHIR Patient that contains the values that are expected following Nictiz' materials (fixture .id: patient-XXX-Weele)
Response contains exactly 1 Patient
Patient resource evaluated in the previous assert contains an .id
Contains .meta with .profile 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/nl-core-Patient'
Contains .identifier with .system and .value

Contains .name with .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order' with .valueCode 'NL1' and .use 'official', and .text with a value, and .family with a value and with .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name' with .valueString with a value, and .given with a value and with .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier' with .valueCode 'BR'. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').name.where(extension('http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order').value.where($this is code) = 'NL1' and use = 'official' and text.hasValue() and family.where($this.hasValue() and extension('http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name').value.where($this is string).hasValue()) and given.where($this.hasValue() and extension('http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier').value.where($this is code) = 'BR')).exists()

description.value: Contains .name.extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-assembly-order' with .valueCode 'NL1'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent
Contains .name.use 'official'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .name.text with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

Contains .name.family with a value and with .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats
Contains .name.family with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .name.family.extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/humanname-own-name' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .name.given with a value and with .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier' with .valueCode 'BR'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats
Contains .name.given with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3-5 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .name.given.extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-EN-qualifier' with .valueCode 'BR'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-3-5 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .name with .use 'usual', and .given with a value. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails
Contains .name.use 'usual'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .name.given with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

Contains .telecom with .system 'phone' and with .extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and .code 'MC' and .display, and .value with a value, and .use 'home'. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').telecom.where(system.where($this = 'phone' and extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and code = 'MC' and display)) and value.hasValue() and use = 'home').exists()

description.value: Contains .telecom.system 'phone' and with .extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and .code 'MC' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').telecom.where(system.where($this = 'phone' and extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and code = 'MC' and display)).exists()).exists()

description.value: Contains .telecom.system 'phone'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5-1 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .telecom.system.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and .code 'MC' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5-1 checks if all children are present in the same parent

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').telecom.where(system.extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and code = 'MC' and display).exists()).exists()

description.value: Contains .telecom.value with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats
Contains .telecom.use 'home'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .telecom with .system 'email', and .value with a value, and .use 'home'. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails
Contains .telecom.system 'email'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-6 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .telecom.value with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-6 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats
Contains .telecom.use 'home'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-6 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .gender 'male' and with .extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AdministrativeGender' and .code 'M' and .display. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').gender.where($this = 'male' and extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AdministrativeGender' and code = 'M' and display)).exists()

description.value: Contains .gender 'male'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-7 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .gender.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AdministrativeGender' and .code 'M' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-7 checks if all children are present in the same parent

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').gender.extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AdministrativeGender' and code = 'M' and display).exists()

description.value: Contains .birthDate

Contains .address with .extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-AddressInformation.AddressType' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and .code 'PHYS' and .display and .use 'home', and .type 'physical', and .line with a value and with .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-streetName' with .valueString with a value and .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-houseNumber' with .valueString with a value, and .city with a value, and .postalCode with a value, and .country with a value and with .extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'urn:iso:std:iso:3166' and .version and .code 'NL' and .display. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').address.where(extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-AddressInformation.AddressType').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and code = 'PHYS' and display) and use = 'home' and type = 'physical' and line.where($this.hasValue() and extension('http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-streetName').value.where($this is string).hasValue() and extension('http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-houseNumber').value.where($this is string).hasValue()) and city.hasValue() and postalCode.hasValue() and country.where($this.hasValue() and extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'urn:iso:std:iso:3166' and version and code = 'NL' and display))).exists()

description.value: Contains .address.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-AddressInformation.AddressType' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and .code 'PHYS' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9 checks if all children are present in the same parent

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').address.where(extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-AddressInformation.AddressType').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-AddressUse' and code = 'PHYS' and display).exists()).exists()

description.value: Contains .address.use 'home'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9 checks if all children are present in the same parent
Contains .address.type 'physical'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .address.line with a value and with .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-streetName' with .valueString with a value and .extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-houseNumber' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').address.where(line.where($this.hasValue() and extension('http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-streetName').value.where($this is string).hasValue() and extension('http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-houseNumber').value.where($this is string).hasValue()).exists()).exists()

description.value: Contains .address.line with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .address.line.extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-streetName' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .address.line.extension with url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/iso21090-ADXP-houseNumber' with .valueString with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9-4 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .address.city with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

Contains .address.postalCode with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

Contains .address.country with a value and with .extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'urn:iso:std:iso:3166' and .version and .code 'NL' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').address.where(country.where($this.hasValue() and extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'urn:iso:std:iso:3166' and version and code = 'NL' and display)).exists()).exists()

description.value: Contains .address.country with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9-7 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .address.country.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'urn:iso:std:iso:3166' and .version and .code 'NL' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-9-7 checks if all children are present in the same parent

expression.value: Patient.where(id = '${patient-XXX-Weele-id}').address.where(country.extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'urn:iso:std:iso:3166' and version and code = 'NL' and display).exists()).exists()

name.value: Serving Consent resources of patient XXX_Weele - Check PractitionerRole

description.value: Check if the previous operation results in a FHIR PractitionerRole that contains the values that are expected following Nictiz' materials (fixture .id: pracrole-12345678901)
Response contains exactly 1 PractitionerRole
PractitionerRole resource evaluated in the previous assert contains an .id
Contains .meta with .profile 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/nl-core-HealthProfessional-PractitionerRole'
Contains .practitioner with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .organization with either .reference or .identifier and .display
Contains .specialty with .coding with .system 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.30.12' and .code 'HAG' and .display

Contains .telecom with .system 'phone' and with .extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.40.4.22.1' and .code 'LL' and .display, and .value with a value, and .use 'work'. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: PractitionerRole.where(id = '${pracrole-12345678901-id}').telecom.where(system.where($this = 'phone' and extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.40.4.22.1' and code = 'LL' and display)) and value.hasValue() and use = 'work').exists()

description.value: Contains .telecom.system 'phone' and with .extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.40.4.22.1' and .code 'LL' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails

expression.value: PractitionerRole.where(id = '${pracrole-12345678901-id}').telecom.where(system.where($this = 'phone' and extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.40.4.22.1' and code = 'LL' and display)).exists()).exists()

description.value: Contains .telecom.system 'phone'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5-1 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .telecom.system.extension with url 'http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification' with .valueCodeableConcept with .coding with .system 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.40.4.22.1' and .code 'LL' and .display. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5-1 checks if all children are present in the same parent

expression.value: PractitionerRole.where(id = '${pracrole-12345678901-id}').telecom.where(system.extension('http://nictiz.nl/fhir/StructureDefinition/ext-CodeSpecification').value.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding.where(system = 'urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.60.40.4.22.1' and code = 'LL' and display).exists()).exists()

description.value: Contains .telecom.value with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats
Contains .telecom.use 'work'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-5 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .telecom with .system 'email', and .value with a value, and .use 'work'. This assert checks if all children exist (if applicable with their specific values) and if they are present within one element. Following asserts check if individual children exist to help you debug if this assert fails
Contains .telecom.system 'email'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-6 checks if all children are present in the same parent

Contains .telecom.value with a value. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-6 checks if all children are present in the same parent. This assert only checks existence of a value, because string comparisons can have many possible caveats
Contains .telecom.use 'work'. This assert checks only one child. Assert 1-6 checks if all children are present in the same parent
